focus: [MON-B3/D6] designer-skills-main command grammar lowered into commandRecipe schema for D2/D3 fixture enforcement

graphEvents.label: What fields must a sk-design command recipe carry so command routing and utilization are fixture-checkable?
designer-skills-main argument hints are typed task inputs such as product/feature, CSS/design file, screen/component, initiative, Figma URL, image, or design decision
External commands encode ordered specialist-skill choreography, which is the missing utilization unit for sk-design commands
External chaining is explicit follow-up suggestion grammar, not silent continuation, so sk-design needs parseable NEXT_OPTIONS/HANDOFF fields
The deep-improvement skill-benchmark D2/D3 router-replay lane can accept a commandRecipe adapter before resource recall
Every task command must declare input class, accepted forms, examples, rejection conditions, produced artifact, and route hint
Every task command with multi-mode work must declare ordered choreography steps with required mode/packet/assets and proof fields
Command chaining must be represented as nextOptions/handoff metadata and may not auto-execute without explicit user request
